scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n docker,backend,website -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm dev:docker" "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:website"
scripts.dev:docker: docker compose up -d --wait && bash scripts/check-services.sh && echo '✓ Services ready' && tail -f /dev/null
scripts.dev:website: sleep 5 && BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:8010 npm --prefix website run dev -- --port 3000
scripts.stop: docker compose down && echo '✓ Services stopped'
